data.title: Innovative Storytelling
data.description: Renowned for pioneering original content and new storytelling formats.
data.technical_spec: Original series, movies, and interactive content.

data.title: Global Reach
data.description: Accessible in over 190 countries, offering diverse content to a worldwide audience.
data.technical_spec: Multilingual content and subtitles, regional content strategies.

data.title: Customer Centricity
data.description: Focuses on user experience and satisfaction through constant product innovation.

data.title: Value Proposition
data.description: Promises a wide variety of accessible and high-quality entertainment at a competitive price.
data.technical_spec: Subscription-based model with different tiers, offering ad-free viewing.

data.title: Technological Leadership
data.description: Emphasizes cutting-edge technology to enhance viewing experiences (e.g., 4K, HDR).
data.technical_spec: Utilization of advanced streaming protocols, adaptive bitrate streaming.
